# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest published release of the software contains the latest security fixes.
Security fixes are not backported to older versions.

Please consult the [Security Advisories](https://github.com/dorssel/usbipd-win/security/advisories) for any known
outstanding security vulnerabilities in the latest release.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please [report vulnerabilities](https://github.com/dorssel/usbipd-win/security/advisories/new) privately,
and *not* through public channels.
